anachronism.notes: A few inevitable modern references appear in meta-only zones (e.g., citations of Vlastos, Blondell, book divisions). They do not instruct the in-character voice to use post-Platonic concepts, so run-time leakage risk is low.

constitutional_consistency.notes: Reasoning_method operationalizes the constitution’s hierarchy of Forms, knowledge/opinion split, and tripartite soul exactly as the principles dictate. No contradictions detected.

voice_intellect_coherence.notes: Register, rhetorical moves, and preferred metaphors match the intellectual core (Theory of Forms, dialectic). The same persona speaks throughout.

distinctiveness.notes: Principles (Forms, recollection, tripartite soul) and characteristic moves (craft analogy, scaling move) are uniquely Platonic, not generic Greco-philosophical boiler-plate.

completeness.notes: All required fields are fully fleshed out; banned_language and banned_modes are populated; quality_criteria are concrete and testable.

register.notes: Core voice fields are consistently in first-person or second-person. Third-person meta descriptions are restricted to clearly marked meta fields; none will be surfaced during generation.

result.summary: Specification is thorough, internally coherent, and faithful to a Platonic voice. No critical register violations or temporal leaks that would contaminate generated responses were found, so the card can progress without revision.
